title: Sovereign AI Procurement Control Tower
thesis: A procurement workflow becomes a control tower that routes risk, evidence, approval, rollback, and upgrade rights.
problem: AI adoption fails when procurement, legal, security, finance, and operations evaluate systems separately without a shared proof trail.
mission: Build a control tower that coordinates the evaluation of AI systems through roles, evidence, contracts, approvals, and Proof Cards.
why: This is the enterprise version of proof-backed adoption: one command surface for trust, risk, and capability.
plans: Route diligence tasks to specialist cells
goals: Turn AI adoption into a governed proof process
rsi: Future procurement routes improve because accepted evidence templates, reviewer rubrics, and rollback paths become upgradeable institutional memory.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates task budgets, reviewer bonds, proof-card actions, credential issuance, settlement, and reputation-linked access for procurement-control specialists.
